purpose: Prove an Env06-like AssumeRole path is not promoted when caller-side permission evidence is malformed or only partially parsed.
claim_surface: The benchmark scorer can require an explicit malformed policy parse marker.
Malformed caller-side policy evidence must not be treated as a clean sts:AssumeRole permission witness.
A false validated admin_reachability finding for this degraded path blocks promotion.
benchmark_proves: The synthetic scenario contains the expected clean sts:AssumeRole trust edge for Alice to the admin role.
The synthetic scenario contains an explicit malformed policy parse marker.
The synthetic scenario does not contain a clean sts:AssumeRole permission edge for the malformed policy.
The synthetic findings contain zero validated admin_reachability findings for the degraded target path.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove live AWS collection behavior.
It does not prove IAMScope parser behavior beyond the frozen artifact scoring contract.
It does not prove every malformed policy parse shape.
unknowns_remaining: Whether future parse-error evidence should become a first-class inconclusive finding remains outside DEG05.
How partial parse recovery should be represented across all policy sources remains future work.

environment.notes: Synthetic evaluated artifact fixture only. No live AWS resources.

ground_truth.reason: The target role trusts Alice and is admin-equivalent, but Alice's caller-side policy evidence is malformed and does not produce a clean sts:AssumeRole permission edge.

directly_proven_if_pass: The degraded fixture contains the clean trust edge.
The degraded fixture contains explicit malformed policy parse evidence.
The benchmark requires a clean AssumeRole permission witness before treating the path as evidence-sufficient.
The degraded fixture is not falsely scored as validated admin reachability.
strongly_supported_if_pass: The benchmark gate catches malformed permission evidence instead of silently promoting a clean-looking admin path.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader malformed-policy behavior outside this exact synthetic fixture remains only implied.
